scripts.gen:divider: node -e "import PptxGenJS from 'pptxgenjs'; import { addDivider } from './generator/builders/divider.js'; import { ASSETS } from './templates/kpmg-diligence/template.js'; const pptx=new PptxGenJS(); pptx.defineLayout({name:'KPMG_WIDE',width:13.333,height:7.5}); pptx.layout='KPMG_WIDE'; addDivider(pptx,{sectionNumber:'01',sectionTitle:'Executive Summary',assets:{gradientDivider:ASSETS.gradientDivider}}); await pptx.writeFile({fileName:'outputs/divider-test.pptx'});"
scripts.template:generate: python3 cli.py extract --template templates/kpmg-diligence --pptx "templates/kpmg-diligence/Diligence+ Reporting Template_Widescreen v2.1.pptx"
